content:
- **Progress (iter-015):** scaffolding the first real paper object `MR4213770.kernelBundle := evalKernel L` into `Basic.lean` (the eval-map / kernel substrate `H⁰(F)⊗𝒪_X→F`, `M_F = ker(ev_F)` landed axiom-clean iter-014). In parallel, building the kernel bundle's locally-free property chain (Hartshorne III.6.5 + rank additivity) in `Foundations.lean`.
- **Standing rationale:** the loop builds the Foundations substrate before the K3/Picard/Grassmannian-level paper objects — typing those earlier would force fake stubs (forbidden). Redirect anytime via `USER_HINTS.md`.
